subject: Add k8scloud CRD
commit_message:
Add k8scloud CRD

Introduces a Custom Resource Definition to manage Kubernetes Cloud Regions
as resources in ONAP. A central ONAP deployment may be used as a
registry for k8s edge clouds that are available to host container-based NFs.
ONAP components can access the registry to create, delete or retrieve k8sclouds.

The management of a k8scloud can be done via kubernetes API extenstion or
by using cli.

Examples:
  # create a k8scloud
  kubectl -n onap create -f oom/kubernetes/onap/resources/examples/k8scloud/onap-east-k8scloud.yaml

  # list k8sclouds
  kubectl -n onap get k8sclouds

  # get k8scloud details
  kubectl -n onap get k8scloud onap-east -o yaml

  # delete a k8scloud
  kubectl -n onap delete k8scloud onap-east

Issue-ID: OOM-2169
Signed-off-by: Mike Elliott <mike.elliott@amdocs.com>
Change-Id: Ib9d5ed6b21119d3b61c0bfde76d0aaec5ac64bc5

Patch Set 1:

Hey @Vijay, @Jack and @Srini. Here is the initial patch for the k8scloud crd. I would really like your feedback on this, especially for the labels. The labels are not cast in stone and in fact I'm looking for your recommendations as to what labels you require.
Thanks,
Mike.
